CREATE TABLE host_masks (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, network INET);
SELECT a.network, sys.hostmask(a.network) FROM host_masks a JOIN host_masks b ON a.id != b.id WHERE a.network != b.network;
WITH subquery AS (SELECT network FROM host_masks WHERE network LIKE '192.168.%') SELECT sys.hostmask(network) FROM subquery;
CREATE TABLE extra_hosts (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, subnet INET);
SELECT sys.hostmask(subnet) FROM extra_hosts WHERE subnet IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sys.hostmask(a.network) FROM host_masks a INNER JOIN host_masks b ON sys.hostmask(a.network) = sys.hostmask(b.network) WHERE a.id < b.id;
